Description.html:p: This file is an ICH M8 maintained code list. It is encoded using OASIS genericode.More information on ICH technical standards is available via the M8 ESTRI webpages at www.ich.org.

AppInfo.html:p: Authored November 2014 on behalf of the ICH M8 ESTRI Expert Working Group. -- Updated May 2024

Identification.CodeListRevisionHistory: Added 23 document types to be used as study tags and Removed 1 document type, Study Data Standardization Plan.

Value.SimpleValue: Clinical study report submitted as one file
IEC and IRB and Consent Form Listings
Signatures of principal or coordinating investigator(s) or sponsor’s responsible officer
Listing of patients receiving test drug(s) from specified batch
Documentation of statistical methods and interim analysis plans
Documentation of Inter-laboratory Standardisation Methods and Quality Assurance or similar documentation
Updated Reference information. Fixed typo in the content-of-document.
Publications Referenced in the Study Report
Patients Excluded from Efficacy Analysis Listing
Compliance and/or Drug Concentration Data Listing
listing individual laboratory measurements by patient
Individual Laboratory Measurements Listed by Patient
Clinical study report submitted as multiple files and that do not apply to ICH E3 reference headings
A file listing documents available upon request for a single study. Consult regional guidance for use.
Reports indicating uses of Biomarkers in various studies
Device description, specifications, performance, handling and complaints

Include information/reports on:- any clinical pharmacological studies / pharmacokinetics of the vector and vector products - any immunological studies, e.g., development of antibodies to the vector and vector products - a long-term follow-up protocol and any available data (especially with integrated retroviral vectors)- environmental assessments, including shedding studies
Hepatic impairment studies conducted to assess the influence of hepatic impairment on pharmacokinetics and, where appropriate, pharmacodynamics of a drug​​
Renal impairment studies conducted to assess the influence of renal impairment on pharmacokinetics and, where appropriate, pharmacodynamics of a drug​​
Drug-drug interaction (DDI) studies conducted to assess the influence of drug-drug interactions on pharmacokinetics and, where appropriate, pharmacodynamics of a drug​
Mass balance study to obtain quantitative information on drug absorption, distribution, metabolism, and elimination properties​​
Report summarizing population pharmacokinetic (population PK) analyses conducted to inform drug development
Report summarizing population pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic analyses conducted to inform drug development
Report summarizing physiologically-based pharmacokinetic analyses conducted to inform drug development
Report summarizing physiologically-based biopharmaceutics modelling conducted to inform recommendations on biopharmaceutics applications
Report summarizing population quantitative systems pharmacology analyses conducted to inform drug development
Checklist document and clinical pharmacology table​​
Stand-alone thorough QT studies or QT assessments performed by combining findings from multiple studies together​
Nonclinical in vitro study report summarize patch clamp studies, in vitro assays, etc. for assessing effects of cardiac channels​​
In vivo nonclinical mechanism of action or proof of concept studies that supplement standard primary and secondary pharmacology studies​
In vitro nonclinical mechanism of action or proof of concept studies that supplement standard primary and secondary pharmacology studies​
Reports addressing Quality of Life studies
Include information/reports on:- long-term follow-up for tumorigenicity - any immunological studies, including panel-reactive antibodies - any special biodistribution studies in humans
Other data not specified in other sections
Reports addressing Pharmacodynamics / Pharmacokinetics Relationship studies
Reports addressing Specialty studies (e.g., Radioactivity Report-ADME, Dissolution Report, Health Authority Request)
foreign clinical studies not under ind
Reports of foreign clinical studies not conducted under an IND
Data definitions for data tabulation datasets
Data definitions for data listing datasets
Special pathogens (e.g., fungi,parasites, mycobacteria) and immune modulator microbiology report
Integrated analysis of safety –integrated summary of safety report
Integrated analysis of efficacy –integrated summary of efficacy report
Integrated analysis of clinical pharmacology - integrated summary of clinical pharmacology report​
Integrated analysis of immunogenicity - integrated summary of immunogenicity report​​
Nonclinical weight-of-evidence or risk assessment documents​
Nonclinical efficacy studies conducted for products regulated under the Animal Rule​
Nonclinical natural history studies that are conducted with chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear agents and used for animal model development for products regulated under the Animal Rule​
Studies conducted to provide complementary safety information to standard pharmacology and toxicology studies
Postmarketing periodic adverse eventdrug experience report description
Protocol describing the design and methodology for a Human Factors validation study.
Report providing the results from a Human Factors validation study.
Human Factors information that is not a validation protocol or report.
